author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

The Joni Awards Return!

The Joni Awards celebrate the heart of the Star Atlas community. The leaders, creators and builders who go above and beyond to push the ecosystem forward. Whether someone is making amazing content, leading a guild, helping others learn, or contributing in unique ways, the Joni Awards are our way of saying thank you.

That said... NOMINATIONS FOR THIS YEAR'S JONI AWARDS ARE NOW LIVE!

This year's categories:
Community Member of the Year,Content Creator of the Year,Most Entertaining Star Atlas Video of the Year,Best Community Tool of the Year,Community Helper of the Year,Best Star Atlas IP Project / Business of the Year,Best Gunplay Player of the Year,Most Knowledgeable Community of the Year (Top 4 Nominees will compete in a live quiz),Most Popular Guild of the Year,
 | Nominate someone you believe deserves the spotlight for their impact on Galia before : https://forms.gle/CjYYvxU6Bn7g5ex99
